page_metadata.biotools__summary: This package was developed to simplify the use of BioConductor tools for beginners having limited or no experience in writing R code. This library provides a graphical interface for microarray gene and exon level analysis as well as miRNA/mRNA-seq data analysis.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: This package was developed to simplify the use of BioConductor tools for beginners having limited or no experience in writing R code. This library provides a graphical interface for microarray gene and exon level analysis as well as miRNA/mRNA-seq data analysis.
